Configuration and templates for generating Pebble watch faces with scripts and C code.

## Folders
- **[watch_generators](watch_generators/README.md)**: Configuration for a simple analog watch face with static image and time elements.

## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: License information for the Apache License, Version 2.0.
- **[generate_watchface.py](generate_watchface.py.md)**: Generates C code for watch faces from JSON configuration files using templates.
- **[make_watchface.sh](make_watchface.sh.md)**: Shell script to generate a watchface using a Python script and build the project.
- **[watch_boilerplate.template.c](watch_boilerplate.template.c.md)**: Template for generating a Pebble watch face with initialization, rendering, and cleanup functions.
- **[watch_templates.py](watch_templates.py.md)**: Templates for generating watchface components, including static images, time text, and analog hands.
